subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud, praised and beloved! In the mighty Qur'án, the manifest Book, these words were revealed: "And We shall raise thee to a praiseworthy station." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمود ممدوح ودود در قرآن عظیم و کتاب مبین و نبعثک مقاما محمودا نازل و اولو
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @station of the Manifestation of God
